games.title: Neon Racer
games.description: Race through a futuristic city in this high-speed arcade game.
games.instructions: Use arrow keys to steer, Space to boost.

games.title: Cyber Puzzle
games.description: Solve mind-bending puzzles in a cyberpunk world.
games.instructions: Click and drag pieces to solve the puzzle.

games.title: Neon Shooter
games.description: Defend your base against waves of neon enemies in this action-packed shooter.
games.instructions: Use WASD to move, mouse to aim and shoot.

games.title: Synthwave Rhythm
games.description: Test your rhythm skills with this synthwave-inspired music game.
games.instructions: Press the corresponding keys as the notes reach the bottom of the screen.

games.title: Neon Platformer
games.description: Navigate through challenging neon-lit levels in this retro-style platformer.
games.instructions: Use arrow keys to move, Space to jump.
